name: VINYL — the offline player
source: Vinyl.dc.html (claude.ai design share) — this file transcribes that design; the HTML mock is the visual reference of record.

philosophy.summary: The interface IS the object: a compact portable turntable rendered as a tactile 2.5D device. Drag the record to scrub, press keycaps to control transport. Warm off-white world, saturated palette accents, soft tinted shadows, playful skeuomorphism.
principles: Object-first: the Now Playing screen is a physical device (ABS body, LED meter, glowing display, keycaps, vinyl). Everything else is quiet flat UI around it.
Physicality: vinyl spins with inertia (ease to 60°/s), drag scrubs (1 revolution = 8s of audio), keycaps depress, LEDs flicker with playback.
One focal point per screen; generous negative space.
Depth through light: layered soft shadows, inset highlights, gloss overlays. The vinyl gloss layer does NOT rotate with the disc.
60fps: all animation on the UI thread (reanimated worklets).

cerulean.role: cool accent, links, gradient partner, section label (GENERAL)

tiffany.role: positive/active: toggles on, YOUR LIBRARY label, teal gradients

sunset.role: warm gradient partner, SOURCES label (#c9873a darkened for text)

coral.role: hero accent: active nav item, like (filled), repeat active, warm gradients

device.note: Device accent default is CORAL #FFB3B6 (mock v2 turntableStyle default). Alternates: Ice blue #CDE6FF, Teal #7FF0E4.

rules: Coral is THE interactive accent: primary buttons, active nav, like, repeat-active, crate hints, switch tracks.
Tiffany is reserved for section identity (YOUR LIBRARY kicker) and positive/informational icons.
Backgrounds stay floralWhite; coral and tiffany never sit adjacent at full saturation.

families.display: Sora (800 ExtraBold, 700 Bold) — titles, numbers, buttons
families.mono: IBM Plex Mono (600) — device display, timestamps, NOW PLAYING kicker

scale.kicker: mono 700 10-11px, letterSpacing 0.2-0.34em, colored per section (tiffany / coral / sunsetText)
scale.deviceDisplay: mono 600 14px uppercase, letterSpacing .16em, displayAccent with glow

typography.icons: Material (rounded) — filled variant for active nav / liked

shadows.deviceBody: -26 32 60 rgba(28,33,42,.32) — light source top-RIGHT so shadows fall bottom-LEFT

nowPlaying.topBar: 40pt icon buttons (white, radius 14): chevron-down → Library, more-horiz → Settings. Center: 'NOW PLAYING' mono kicker + album name
nowPlaying.deviceStage: device card 300×398 centered, vinyl overhangs top-right (-40 right, -60 top)

device.ledMeter: upper-left 50×174 black inset panel; 2×8 grid of 13px rounded LEDs; bottom N rows lit in coral displayAccent with glow; playing: N flickers 3–8 every ~110ms; paused: N=2
device.vinyl: 232px disc: layered groove rings over near-black radial; 120px hub with 3 white tick marks + 9px spindle; static gloss overlay on top; draggable
device.displayPanel: 256×48 dark inset panel: scrolling/ellipsis track title (mono, glow) + 10-bar EQ animation (paused freezes bars)
device.transportKeycaps: 3 vertical keycaps 40×78 (radius 9): play/pause (with coral glow LED strip), previous, next; press = translateY 2px + inset shadow

nowPlaying.trackMeta: title (Sora 26) + artist left, 44pt like button right (coral when liked, filled heart)
nowPlaying.progress: 5px track #D9D5CD inset, dark gradient fill, 15px white thumb with dark ring; mono timestamps below
nowPlaying.secondaryControls: centered row gap 34: shuffle (tiffany when on), repeat (coral when on, repeat-one icon at mode 2), queue → Playlists

visualizer.spec: graphic-eq icon in the top bar (next to Settings) swaps the turntable device for a themed react-three-fiber ring visualizer (src/three/NowPlayingVisualizer.tsx), same stage area.
visualizer.scene: 4 flat concentric rings in coral/tiffany/cerulean/sunset, each on its own sine-wobble speed+phase, slow overall Z rotation, occasional randomized 'kick' pulse (~0.5-0.8s apart) while playing; envelope drops to near-still when paused.
visualizer.honestLimitation: expo-audio exposes no playback waveform/FFT tap on this stack, so this is a convincing simulated envelope, not real frequency analysis. Canvas only mounts while toggled on AND the tab is focused.

library.spec: Vertical coverflow list (user spec v4) — replaces the 3D crate. Plain RN views + Reanimated, no GL canvas.
library.layout: black stage. Top: 'Library' title (Sora 30) + bare white plus button. Below: rounded search field, full width. Center: the coverflow list at ~62% screen height.
library.list: each row 86px: circular art (56px, 64px centered) + title/artist. Distance from the centered focal row (continuously derived from scroll offset, not discrete steps) drives scale (1 → 0.73 over 3 rows), opacity (1 → 0.06), a perspective rotateX tilt (±18°), and an art desaturation wash — approximates the CSS spec's per-row blur without the GPU cost of live blur views per row. The centered row alone shows a soft background wash and a coral Play pill; tapping it is a no-op unless that row is actually centered (guards fast-scroll mis-taps). Snap-to-center scrolling (snapToInterval = row height).
library.sound: record-shuffle flourish (700ms of the spin sample) on play

groups: PLAYBACK (tiffany kicker): Audio quality row, Equalizer row, Crossfade toggle (tiffany track, knob 22px)
SOURCES (sunsetText kicker): 'Connect a service' warm gradient card → Onboarding
GENERAL (cerulean kicker): Appearance (Light), Offline storage, Privacy policy (store requirement), About VINYL v1.0.0
settings.rowAnatomy: white group card radius 20, hairline #F0EADF dividers inset 16, colored 24px leading icon, title 15/700, sub 12/600 muted2, chevron trailing

onboarding.presentation: slide-up overlay over everything, teal gradient background with soft blurred palette circles
onboarding.content: glass close button, 'GET STARTED' kicker, 'Bring all your music together' Sora 34, body copy, source cards (Import files / Scan device / Streaming services — all live, -> /connect for streaming), ink 'Start listening' button pinned bottom

connect.content: one card per service (Spotify, YouTube Music, Apple Music): flat brand-color badge (no logo assets), Connect/Import action. Import flow: playlist list -> track-match results (coral 'Play the N matched tracks', unmatched rows deep-link out to the source app). Official APIs only — no audio ever streams into this app.

identify.presentation: slide-up overlay, pure black stage — Song ID ('what's this song')
identify.content: idle: coral mic button + prompt copy. Listening: 3 staggered coral pulse rings around the mic (1.8s, delay 0/600/1200ms) for the 8s capture window. Identifying: spinner glyph swap. Result: title/artist/album + Spotify/Apple Music open links if matched, or a 'no match' state. All states offer 'listen again'.
identify.backend: records via expo-audio's useAudioRecorder, ships the clip to a Cloudflare Worker proxy (server/identify-proxy/) which holds the real AudD token server-side — the app itself never has it. The only network-dependent feature in the app.

visual.spec: The Earth and Moon diorama. No chrome except the floating settings button.
visual.idle: drag to spin (momentum), pinch to zoom 0.7–1.7, single tap = zoom-pulse + chime (idle only).
visual.playing: the Earth gently rocks (±~1°) and pulses (≤4.5% scale) with a layered-sine beat envelope; drag disabled. No bars, no labels.
visual.sky: in-scene: night = navy→black + starfield + moonlight + warm sunlight fill; day = sunset gradient + low sun. Follows dark mode.
visual.nowPlaying: bottom-center: bubbly Fredoka display title + Manrope artist, lifted clear of the floating nav.
visual.model: assets/models/earth-moon.glb — textureless (flat baseColorFactor materials: blue oceans, green land, gray moon), materials forced DoubleSide. Box3 re-center + normalize to 2.04.

navigation.pattern: floating pill tab bar: left/right 16, bottom 16, height 66, radius 26, white ~90% + blur, 5 items
navigation.states: active: coral + filled icon; idle: #B3BCC3. Labels 9px/800.
navigation.contentInset: scrollable screens need ~120pt bottom padding to clear the bar
navigation.note: Search and Lists tabs removed in v3 — search lives inside Library; collections return with real playlists later.

motion.vinylSpin: target 60°/s while playing; ease-in factor .06/frame; ease-out .08/frame on pause
motion.vinylScrub: drag angle delta rotates disc 1:1; progress += deg/360 × 8s; clamp to track; velocity follows drag
motion.screenChange: cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1) 440ms (mock uses translateX 22% + scale .9 + rotateY -8° carousel; native app may use simpler fade/native transitions)

accessibility.gestures: vinyl scrub and every device control have plain-button equivalents
accessibility.reduceMotion: disable vinyl spin, LED flicker, EQ animation; keep functional transitions
accessibility.contrast: ink on floralWhite AA; displayAccent on near-black AA

map.transport.wav: next / previous keycaps + record selection in the crate
map.spin-loop.mp3: loops while scrubbing the vinyl by hand

sound.rule: UI sounds are one-shot players separate from the music pipeline; user-toggleable in Settings > Interface sounds

detection: 1. App-folder auto-scan on EVERY launch: documentDirectory root + music/ (no permission needed). iOS Files app shows the VINYL folder (UIFileSharingEnabled) — files dropped there just appear.
2. Android device-wide media scan when READ_MEDIA_AUDIO granted.
3. Document-picker import as the LAST-RESORT fallback; picked files are copied into music/ and re-detected by the folder scan.
backend.persistence: zustand persist + AsyncStorage: vinyl-library (tracks, sort), vinyl-player (likes, history, shuffle, repeat), vinyl-settings
backend.playback: single AudioPlayer pipeline; old player paused+released before the next loads; load token discards superseded rapid presses

dark.progressFill: coral gradient (dark fill invisible on black)

darkMode.rule: Accents (coral/tiffany/cerulean/sunset) are shared across modes; the turntable device is a physical object and does not re-theme.

themeRules.themedSurfaces: Play, Library, You, Settings follow useThemeColors (light floralWhite / dark pure #000).
themeRules.darkStageSurfaces: Identify (Song ID) and Connect modals are intentionally dark in BOTH modes — immersive, camera-like surfaces.
themeRules.device: The turntable device never re-themes; it is a physical object.
themeRules.library: Coverflow list is theme-aware: dark = white text on black, light = ink text on floralWhite; row wash and art dim derive from the active theme.
